title: Occurrence of ticks and tick-borne mixed parasitic microbiota in cattle
author: Hasan, M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 2. RLB specific primer PCR detection of DNA in cross-bred Cattle (Friesian x Sahiwal). L1 100bp ladder. L2 & L3 negative control, L4 PCR positive control. L6, L8, L9, L11, L12, L13, L15, L16, L17, L18, L19 positive for protozoan specific to primers.
